stem: Circle A in the xy-plane has the equation (x − 8)2 + (y + 3)2 = 9. Circle B has the same center as circle A. The radius of circle B is three times the radius of circle A. The equation defining circle B in the xy-plane is (x − 8)2 + (y + 3)2 = k, where k is a constant. What is the value of k?
rationale: Circle A has r2 = 9, so its radius is 3. Tripling gives a new radius of 9, so k = 92 = 81.
